import importlib

ALLOWED_PLUGINS = {"formatter_v1", "formatter_v2", "default_exporter"}

def load_user_plugin(config):
    # Correct: always validate dynamic imports against a strict, hardcoded allowlist
    plugin_name = config.get("custom_plugin_name")
    if plugin_name not in ALLOWED_PLUGINS:
        raise ValueError(f"Plugin {plugin_name} is not allowed.")
    return importlib.import_module(plugin_name)
